sourceRef: tip:Five signs your SAP process needs a refresh

slides.headline: Revolutionize Your SAP Process
slides.body: Automate certifications, track compliance, and support student veterans.

slides.headline: Streamline Certification
slides.body: Reduce manual errors with automated certification processes.

slides.headline: Centralize Records
slides.body: Centralize all student data in one platform for easy access.

slides.headline: Compliance Check
slides.body: Automatically track compliance with federal regulations.

slides.headline: Student Support
slides.body: Enhance support for student veterans with streamlined processes.

slides.headline: Data Analytics
slides.body: Gain insights to improve student outcomes and program efficiency.

outline.caption: Revolutionize your SAP process with VASCO Assistant Pro. Streamline certification, centralize records, ensure compliance, support student veterans, and gain data insights. Automate, track, and support. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is 'Compliance Check' as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to draw attention.
